# `src/vantage_v5/webapp/vendor/highlight.min.js`

Vendored browser build of Highlight.js used for local fenced-code readability.

## Purpose

- Provide a local browser-side syntax-highlighting runtime so Vantage can render fenced code blocks without depending on a runtime CDN.
- Support the shared `math_render.mjs` read-surface renderer used by chat, concepts, the library inspector, and the whiteboard preview.

## Notable Behavior

- This file is third-party vendored code rather than repo-authored application logic.
- The current Vantage integration uses Highlight.js as a narrow rendering dependency behind `math_render.mjs`; the rest of the app should not call the global directly.
- The renderer treats Highlight.js as optional: code still renders readably if the runtime is absent, but highlighted markup is richer when the asset is available.
